ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the software package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software package */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the package was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the package was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software package the test belongs to */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., unit test, integration test) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the test (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the test was last updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES software_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was run */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the test */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was run */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used for the test */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system used for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_failures" (
  "failure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test failure */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "failure_message" TEXT /* Message describing the failure */,
  "failure_stack_trace" TEXT /* Stack trace of the failure */,
  "failureCATEGORY" TEXT /* Category of the failure (e.g., assertion, timeout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("failure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_failures_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_ignored" (
  "ignored_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ignored test */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "ignored_reason" TEXT /* Reason for ignoring the test */,
  "ignored_by" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who ignored the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ignored_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_ignored_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_ignored_ignored_by FOREIGN KEY ("ignored_by") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., QA, Dev) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test assignment */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the test */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the test was assigned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the test */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test assignment (e.g., in_progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_assignments_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_assignments_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "widget_data" TEXT /* Data for the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., test_failure, test_completion) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message for the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
